description: Premium restaurant iftar offerings during Ramadan, featuring pricing, location details, and reservation information to drive direct bookings.
structural_recipe: Lead with Ramadan greeting (رمضان مبارك). Feature restaurant name prominently with location tag. Include per-person pricing in SAR. Add high-quality food/dining photography. Provide clear reservation contact (phone number or WhatsApp link). Optional: credit photographer. Format: Arabic primary text + English restaurant name + location emoji + pricing + contact details.
why_it_works: Ramadan iftar is a sacred dining occasion in Saudi culture tied to family and community. Providing clear pricing and booking removes friction for affluent consumers seeking premium experiences. Location specificity (mall/tower landmarks) adds prestige and accessibility. Direct contact info enables immediate conversion during high-intent shopping window.
transplantation_caveats: Iftar dining is Ramadan-specific; pattern has limited seasonality
Premium pricing (SAR 140-500 per person) targets high-income segments only
Location names must reference recognizable Saudi landmarks or malls for credibility
Reservation links/phone numbers must be actively monitored during Ramadan
cultural_constraints: Must respect Islamic context and fasting significance
Pricing transparency is expected and builds trust
Location prestige (Faisaliya Tower, Al-Sulaymaniyah) influences perceived value
